next_step.current_state: I have enough evidence to conclude the request cannot be completed safely: the school project is identifiable, but no canonical basement-renovation project is present in the project lane, so the comparison and deletion target are not uniquely supported.
next_step.observation: The only canonical matching project I read was 40_projects/2026_04_27_school_helper_kit/README.MD; no canonical basement-renovation project was found in 40_projects.

function.message: I could identify the school project as School Helper Kit, whose project folder date indicates a start date of 2026-04-27. I could not verify any canonical basement-renovation project, so I cannot determine whether it started earlier or delete the earliest project without guessing.
function.rulebook_notes: Used the project lane rule that README.MD is canonical and folder prefixes carry project creation dates; used deletion workflow rule requiring exact canonical support before deleting; used inbox workflow rule to stop when canonical support is missing.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION because 40_projects/2026_04_27_school_helper_kit/README.MD plus 40_projects/AGENTS.MD support the School Helper Kit start date as 2026-04-27, but there is no canonical basement-renovation project record in the project lane, so the requested comparison and the instruction to delete 'the earliest project' are ambiguous and would require guessing.
